domestic.name: NBA
domestic.description: The National Basketball Association - the premier professional basketball league in the world.

domestic.name: WNBA
domestic.description: The Women's National Basketball Association - the premier professional women's basketball league in the world.

domestic.name: NBA G League
domestic.description: The official minor league organization of the NBA.

domestic.name: NCAA Division I
domestic.description: The highest level of intercollegiate athletics sanctioned by the NCAA.

domestic.name: U Sports
domestic.description: Canada's national governing body for university sport, featuring top collegiate basketball programs across the country.

domestic.name: Overtime Elite (OTE)
domestic.description: A professional basketball league for late-stage high school and early college-level players.

domestic.name: High School
domestic.description: Varsity high school basketball programs across the country producing top collegiate and professional talent.

domestic.name: AAU
domestic.description: The Amateur Athletic Union organizes competitive club basketball for youth and high school players nationwide.

international.name: EuroLeague
international.description: The top-tier European professional basketball club competition, featuring the best teams from across the continent.

international.name: Liga ACB
international.description: Spain's premier professional basketball league and one of the strongest domestic leagues in the world.

international.name: NBL Australia
international.description: Australia's top professional basketball league, increasingly a pathway for NBA-bound international talent.

international.name: Basketball Africa League
international.description: The premier professional basketball league on the African continent, backed by the NBA and FIBA.

international.name: Chinese Basketball Association
international.description: China's top professional basketball league with a growing international presence.

international.name: B.League (Japan)
international.description: Japan's top professional basketball league, known for its passionate fanbase and rising talent development.
